executives.name: Kent Masters
executives.background: Mr. Masters has served as Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Albemarle since April 2020. He was previously a non-employee director of Albemarle from 2015 to 2020. Prior to joining Albemarle, he served as an Operating Partner of Advent International and as Chief Executive Officer of Foster Wheeler AG.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Neal Sheorey
executives.background: Mr. Sheorey has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since November 2023. Prior to joining Albemarle, he served as Vice President, Finance for Dow Inc.'s Coatings & Performance Monomers and Plastic Additives businesses.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Kristin Coleman
executives.background: Ms. Coleman has served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary since November 2022. Prior to joining Albemarle, she served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of US Foods Holding Corp.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Nneka Chiazor
executives.background: Ms. Chiazor has served as Vice President, Government Affairs since 2021. Prior to joining Albemarle, she held leadership roles at Cox Communications and Verizon.

executives.name: Stacy Ruley
executives.background: Ms. Ruley has served as Vice President, Chief Accounting Officer since 2021. She joined Albemarle in 2015 and has held various finance leadership roles.

executives.name: Dean Seavers
executives.background: Former President and Executive Director of National Grid plc.

executives.name: Diarmuid O'Connell
executives.background: Former Vice President of Business Development at Tesla, Inc.

executives.name: Gerald Steiner
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President, Sustainability and Corporate Affairs of Monsanto Company.

executives.name: Glenda Minor
executives.background: Chief Executive Officer and Principal of Silket Advisory Services. Former SVP and Controller of Evraz North America Limited.

executives.name: Holly Van Deursen
executives.background: Former Group Vice President, Petrochemicals of BP plc.

executives.name: Jim O'Brien
executives.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Ashland Inc.

executives.name: Laurie Brlas
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Newmont Mining Corporation. Former CFO of Cliffs Natural Resources.

executives.name: Mark Widmar
executives.background: Mr. Widmar has served as our Chief Executive Officer since July 2016 and as a member of our board of directors since joining the company in 2011. He previously served as our Chief Financial Officer from 2011 to 2016.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Ralf Cramer
executives.background: Former Member of the Executive Board of Continental AG and President and CEO of Continental China.

executives.name: William Hernandez
executives.background: Former Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of PPG Industries, Inc.
